title: Unshiny Spawn Eggs
description: Reduces the shine of the new spawn eggs and makes them appear more flat, similar effect to the old spawn eggs.
body:
# Unshiny Spawn Eggs

Do you not like the shiny nature of the new spawn eggs? Here is an alternative that tries to keep the original artistic style of the old spawn eggs while keeping the new textures.

All spawn eggs have been edited to have less highlights and less shadows.

# Screenshots
![Pack Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf0065de535605c5a86b27f86a90d6544550a26e.webp)
